# isRecordZoneNotification

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether this notification is a push notification that was sent because of changes to a record zone.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute Boolean isRecordZoneNotification;
```

## Discussion

`true` if this notification is a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordZoneNotification] object; otherwise, `false`.

## Getting the Notification Type

- **notificationType**: The type of notification.
- **isQueryNotification**: A Boolean value indicating whether this push notification is a query notification.
